items.title: Tested: Bluetti’s Elite 10 Mini power station is my favorite new companion for long drives and short trips from home
items.summary:
I’ve been familiar with Bluetti’s power stations for years now, having used different models owned by friends while camping and during other off-grid adventures, and they’ve always been as reliable as those from other brands like Anker SOLIX, EcoFlow, Jackery, Goal Zero, and more. A few months ago, the brand launched its smallest solution, the Elite 10 Mini Portable Power Station, and as someone who does prefer the phrase “less is more,” I was eager to get my hands on one after the loss of the now-discontinued Jackery Explorer 100 Plus over the course of 2025. It’s been a handy companion for my regular trips to Virginia to help my parents in their old age, and below, you can get my hands-on breakdown of what you can expect.

Amazon is delivering the best prices yet on the brand new M5 MacBook Air this week. This morning, it is also delivering a new all-time low on the most affordable 13-inch model in the Midnight finish with 16GB of RAM and the 512GB SSD at $150 off the list price.

items.title: Amazon is ending support for older Kindles and Kindle Fires
items.summary: Amazon has announced that starting on May 20th, 2026, Kindle e-readers and Kindle Fire devices released in 2012 and earlier will "no longer be able to purchase, borrow, or download new content via the Kindle Store," Amazon spokesperson Jackie Burke wrote in an email to The Verge. Users will still be able to read books […]

items.title: Save up to 34% on these three EGO Multi-Head Combo kit bundles with two attachments at new $390 lows
items.summary:
We’re seeing some rare EGO Multi-Head bundle deals over at Amazon right now on three different packages, like the 56V Cordless Electric Multi-Head Combo Kit with a Power Head, 15-inch string trimmer, and an extra 10-inch pole saw attachment down at $389.99 shipped. This bundle would normally go for $589 were you buying the string trimmer/power head and the pole saw attachment separately, and to make things better, previous discounts here have only ever gone as low as $518 – plus, the standalone string trimmer and power head kit that we usually see benefiting from discounts is currently priced at $389, making things all the sweeter. You’re saving $199 off the going rate for a new all-time low price. Alongside the above bundle, there are also bundles with the string trimmer/power head and an extra 12-inch brush cutter attachment at $389.99 shipped, as well as the same trimmer/power head package with an extra 8-inch carbon fiber edger also at $389.99 shipped.

more…

items.title: Enjoy more leisure and up to 70-mile ranges on Lectric’s XP Trike2 + up to $558 in FREE gear from $1,499
items.summary:
Popping back in on Lectric’s current April Showers e-bike sale with up to $720 savings, you can find the XP Trike2 750 Long-Range eTrikes with a FREE $558 bundle at $1,799 shipped right now, while the standard XP Trike2 models are getting FREE $455 bundles at $1,499 shipped. These packages are some of the largest we’ve seen to date, with them costing $2,357 and $1,954 were it not for the discounts on that gear, which is the common occurrence for the brand’s e-bikes. The standard XP Trike2 bundles give you front and rear steel-encased baskets, a suspension seat post, an Elite headlight, and a support seat, while the XP Trike2 750 bundles add in a pair of mirrors and an accordion-style bike lock. You can shop the full lineup of deals in our original coverage here, and learn more about the XP Trike2 variations below.

items.title: Apple lovers can upgrade spigots with the Eve Aqua HomeKit smart water controller down at $120
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the Eve Aqua Apple HomeKit Smart Water Controller down at $119.99 shipped. Normally going for $150 at full price, we saw this 1-device package slide into 2026 at $112 before jumping up to its full rate and staying there until March 25, when the Amazon Big Spring Sale began. During that weeklong event, we also spotted the 2-device package getting its first-ever discount to $200 ($100 each). If you missed out on that discount, the deal here gives you a single controller at $20 more, and while we have seen it go lower in the past, it’s still a solid 20% markdown that saves you $30 as you upgrade your outdoor spigot.

more…

items.title: Nintendo 2026 leak/rumor roundup: New Zelda, Metroid, StarFox, special edition Switch 2, more
items.summary:
In case you somehow missed it, there has been a massive leak over at Nintendo. Somebody is stealing all of the Mushroom Kingdom’s biggest secrets and leaking them all over the internet. As exciting as some of this leaked information is, I almost hope it’s all fake and Nintendo completely surprises everyone over the next few months.

items.title: Save big ahead of summer: Up to 50% off patio furniture and outdoor must-haves
items.summary:
Right now, Amazon is offering major savings on outdoor must-haves for the season ahead. Patio and outdoor gear isn’t exactly cheap, so getting in early is usually the move if you want the best prices before peak summer demand hits. We’re already seeing some solid discounts roll in—think patio furniture sets, those popular folding wagon chairs, tilt umbrellas, and a bunch of other warm-weather essentials.

items.title: SANDMARC debuts new full-grain leather SD card wallet for creators [Exclusive launch deal]
items.summary:
SANDMARC is back at it again today with a new release. The brand is easily among our favorite accessory makers when it comes to the sorts of gear that supports creators and iPhoneographers, not to mention its gorgeous Apple Watch bands and iPhone cases. But today it is introducing the all-new Capture Leather Wallet to neatly stow SD cards and everything else you would normally have in there. You can also use our exclusive 9TO5TOYS discount code at checkout to secure a deal on your pre-order.
